new_entries.title: GCC Technical regulation for "Vehicles - "eCall" Emergency calls Technical Requirements"
new_entries.summary: GCC Technical Regulations for Vehicles - "eCall" Emergency calls Technical Requirements, This regulation is concerned with the technical requirements for the emergency call system (eCall) for all passenger vehicles not more than eight seats in addition to the driver's (regardless of the vehicle's weight) and for light-duty vehicles with a weight not exceeding 3500 kg, which are imported or manufactured for registration and licensing in the GCC countries This standard exempted vehicle produced in small series.

meta.Document symbol(s): G/TBT/N/ARE/703, G/TBT/N/BHR/780, G/TBT/N/KWT/764, G/TBT/N/OMN/603, G/TBT/N/QAT/754, G/TBT/N/SAU/1437, G/TBT/N/YEM/351
meta.Objectives: Protection of human health or safety (TBT), Quality requirements (TBT), Harmonization (TBT)

new_entries.llm_note: This regulation mandates the installation of eCall emergency call systems in all new passenger vehicles (up to 8 seats plus driver) and light-duty vehicles (up to 3500 kg) imported or manufactured for registration in GCC countries. This is highly relevant to the automobile industry as it requires the integration of new hardware and software systems into a broad range of vehicles, necessitating significant design, testing, and certification efforts for manufacturers and importers targeting the GCC market. The exemption for small series production offers limited relief.

new_entries.title: GCC Technical regulation for "Vehicles - "eCall" Emergency calls Technical Requirements"
new_entries.summary: GCC Technical Regulations for Vehicles - "eCall" Emergency calls Technical Requirements, This regulation is concerned with the technical requirements for the emergency call system (eCall) for all passenger vehicles not more than eight seats in addition to the driver's (regardless of the vehicle's weight) and for light-duty vehicles with a weight not exceeding 3500 kg, which are imported or manufactured for registration and licensing in the GCC countries This standard exempted vehicle produced in small series.

meta.Document symbol(s): G/TBT/N/ARE/703, G/TBT/N/BHR/780, G/TBT/N/KWT/764, G/TBT/N/OMN/603, G/TBT/N/QAT/754, G/TBT/N/SAU/1437, G/TBT/N/YEM/351
meta.Objectives: Protection of human health or safety (TBT), Quality requirements (TBT), Harmonization (TBT)

new_entries.llm_note: This regulation mandates the implementation of eCall emergency call systems for all passenger vehicles (up to 8 seats plus driver) and light-duty vehicles (up to 3500 kg) imported or manufactured for registration in GCC countries. This is highly relevant to the automobile industry as it requires the integration of new hardware and software systems into a broad range of vehicles, necessitating design changes, testing, and certification processes for compliance. The impact is significant due to the broad scope and the requirement for new safety-critical systems.
